name: AutoDimension
description: Automatically dimensions the selected drawing view.

parameters.name: EntitiesToDimension
parameters.description: Entities to dimension as defined in swAutodimEntities_e

parameters.name: HorizontalScheme
parameters.description: Horizontal dimensioning scheme as defined in swAutodimScheme_e

parameters.name: HorizontalPlacement
parameters.description: Placement relative to the drawing view as defined in swAutodimHorizontalPlacement_e

parameters.name: VerticalScheme
parameters.description: Vertical dimensioning scheme as defined in swAutodimScheme_e

parameters.name: VerticalPlacement
parameters.description: Placement relative to the drawing view as defined in swAutodimVerticalPlacement_e

return_value: swAutodimStatusSuccess if the view is automatically dimensioned; see swAutodimStatus_e for reasons for possible failures

name: Create3rdAngleViews2
description: Creates standard three orthographic views (third angle projection) for the specified model.

parameters.name: ModelName
parameters.description: Name of the document from which to create views

return_value: True if successful, false if not

name: CreateDrawViewFromModelView3
description: Creates a drawing view on the current drawing sheet using the specified model view.

parameters.name: ModelName
parameters.description: Full pathname of the model document for which to create the drawing view (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ViewName
parameters.description: Name of the model view from which to create the drawing view (see Remarks)

parameters.name: LocX
parameters.description: x location of drawing view center in meters

parameters.name: LocY
parameters.description: y location of drawing view center in meters

parameters.name: LocZ
parameters.description: z location of drawing view center in meters

return_value: Pointer to the newly create IView object

name: GetFirstView
description: Gets the first drawing view on the current sheet.
return_value: First drawing view in this drawing document

name: Extension
description: Gets the IModelDocExtension object, which also allows access to the model document.

name: EditRebuild3
description: Rebuilds only those features that need to be rebuilt in the active configuration in the model.
return_value: True if only those features that need to be rebuilt are rebuilt in the active configuration in the model, false if not

name: ForceRebuild3
description: Forces a rebuild of all features in the active configuration in the model.

parameters.name: TopOnly
parameters.description: True rebuilds the top-level assembly only; false rebuilds the top-level assembly and all subassemblies

return_value: True if all features in the active configuration at the specified assembly level in the model are rebuilt, false if not

name: Save3

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Mode in which to save the document as defined in swSaveAsOptions_e

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Errors that caused the save operation to fail as defined in swFileSaveError_e

parameters.name: Warnings
parameters.description: Warnings or extra information generated during the save operation as defined in swFileSaveWarning_e

return_value: True if the save was successful, false if not

name: AlignDimensions
description: Aligns the selected dimensions in drawing documents.

parameters.name: AlignType
parameters.description: Type of alignment as defined by swAlignDimensionType_e

parameters.name: SpaceValue
parameters.description: Distance between dimensions

return_value: True if the dimensions are aligned, false if not

name: SaveAs3
description: Exports or saves the active model (document) to a specified file path as a specific file format, such as an STL, STEP, or PDF file.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Full pathname of the document to save; the file extension indicates any conversion that should be performed (for example, Part1.igs to save in IGES format) (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Format in which to save this document as defined in swSaveAsVersion_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Option indicating how to save the document as defined in swSaveAsOptions_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ExportData
parameters.description: IExportPdfData object for exporting drawing sheets to PDF (see Remarks)

parameters.name: AdvancedSaveAsOptions
parameters.description: IAdvancedSaveAsOptions (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Errors that caused the save to fail as defined in swFileSaveError_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Warnings
parameters.description: Warnings or extra information generated during the save operation as defined in swFileSaveWarning_e (see Remarks)

return_value: True if the save is successful, false if not

name: SelectByID2

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Name of object to select or an empty string

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Type of object (uppercase) as defined in swSelectType_e or an empty string

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: X selection location or 0

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: Y selection location or 0

parameters.name: Z
parameters.description: Z selection location or 0

parameters.name: Append
parameters.description:
If...	An, if entity is...	Then...
True	Not already selected	Entity is appended to the current selection list
	Already selected	Entity is removed from the current selection list
False	Not already selected	Current selection is cleared and then the entity is put on the list
	Already selected	Current selection list remains the same

parameters.name: Mark
parameters.description: Value that you want to use as a mark; this value is used by other functions that require ordered selection (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Callout
parameters.description: Pointer to the associated callout

parameters.name: SelectOption
parameters.description: Selection option as defined in swSelectOption_e (see Remarks)

return_value: True if item was successfully selected, false if not

name: GetImportFileData
description: Gets the IGES or DXF/DWG import data for the specified file.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Path and name of the IGES or DXF/DWG file

return_value: IGES import data or DXF/DWG import data

name: GetUserPreferenceStringValue
description: Gets system default user preference values.

parameters.name: UserPreference
parameters.description: User preference as defined in swUserPreferenceStringValue_e

name: LoadFile4
description: Loads a third-party native CAD file into a new SOLIDWORKS document using 3D Interconnect.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Full path and file name of the third-party native CAD part or assembly document to import (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ArgString
parameters.description: Space-separated string that allows optional arguments to be specified when opening a third-party native CAD file; empty string if 3D Interconnect is enabled (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ImportData
parameters.description: IImportIgesData, IImportDxfDwgData, or IImportStepData object; null or Nothing if 3D Interconnect is not enabled (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Errors as defined in swFileLoadError_e

name: OpenDoc6
description: Opens an existing document and returns a pointer to the document object.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Document name or full path if not in current directory, including extension

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Document type as defined in swDocumentTypes_e

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Mode in which to open the document as defined in swOpenDocOptions_e

parameters.name: Configuration
parameters.description:
Model configuration in which to open this document

Applies to parts and assemblies, not drawings

If this argument is empty or the specified configuration is not present in the model, the model is opened in the last-used configuration

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Load errors as defined in swFileLoadError_e (See Remarks)

parameters.name: Warnings
parameters.description: Warnings or extra information generated during the open operation as defined in swFileLoadWarning_e

return_value: Newly loaded model document or NULL if document failed to open

name: NewDocument
description: Creates a new document based on the specified template.

parameters.name: TemplateName
parameters.description: Fully qualified path and name of the template to use for creating the new document

parameters.name: PaperSize
parameters.description: Size of paper as defined in swDwgPaperSizes_e

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Width of paper; used only when PaperSize is swDwgPapersUserDefined

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Height of paper; used only when PaperSize is swDwgPapersUserDefined

return_value: Newly created document or NULL if the operation fails

name: UseSheetScale
description: Gets or sets whether the scale of the drawing view is the same as the scale of the drawing sheet on which this view is located.
property_value: 1 if the view scale is the same as the sheet scale, 0 if the view scale is independent of the sheet scale

name: GetNextView
description: Gets the next drawing view in the drawing.

name: Type
property_value: Type of drawing view as defined by swDrawingViewTypes_e
